objective: Test input for scientific-paper-meta-analysis skill, derived from DCI (Dr. Frederico Chaves / Identidade Metabolica) app domain.

test_batches.description: Core metabolic identity topics aligned with DCI patient accompaniment model.

topics.query: GLP-1 receptor agonists cardiovascular outcomes type 2 diabetes
topics.relevance_to_dci: Primary pharmacotherapy for metabolic patients under DCI accompaniment.

topics.query: obesity pharmacotherapy long-term weight maintenance behavioral accompaniment
topics.relevance_to_dci: Behavioral + pharmacological models matching DCI's non-automated, doctor-led approach.

topics.query: ketogenic diet metabolic syndrome insulin resistance clinical trial
topics.relevance_to_dci: Dietary intervention research for metabolic identity profiling.

topics.query: digital health remote patient monitoring obesity weight management
topics.relevance_to_dci: Evidence base for DCI's digital portal and check-in/dose-log features.

topics.query: patient-reported outcomes hunger satiety energy quality of life obesity treatment
topics.relevance_to_dci: Validates DCI check-in fields: hunger, nausea, energy, weight, notes.

test_batches.description: Adjacent lifestyle and metabolic research for protocol expansion.

topics.query: time-restricted eating circadian rhythm metabolic health randomized controlled trial
topics.relevance_to_dci: Lifestyle timing interventions for metabolic identity.

topics.query: gut microbiome obesity metabolic endotoxemia intervention
topics.relevance_to_dci: Emerging metabolic factor for patient education content library.

topics.query: exercise prescription obesity resistance training aerobic combined metabolic outcomes
topics.relevance_to_dci: Physical activity protocols for patient accompaniment.

test_batches.description: Safety, ethics, and regulatory topics for DCI content and terms.

topics.query: informed consent telemedicine digital health brazil portuguese language
topics.relevance_to_dci: Legal/ethical foundation for DCI privacy/terms pages and evaluation request flow.

topics.query: medication adherence GLP-1 semaglutide liraglutide dropout predictors
topics.relevance_to_dci: Understanding patient dropout and adherence for DCI pending/active status design.

execution_notes.rate_limit_discipline: PubMed 3 req/s (0.34s sleep), arXiv 3s between pages, CrossRef/OpenAlex 5 workers with mailto=.
execution_notes.deduplication_priority: DOI > PMID > ArXiv ID > title similarity. Prefer CrossRef for citations/ORCID, PubMed for MeSH, OpenAlex for OA URLs.
execution_notes.ranking_formula: Doctor Relevance Score = log1p(citations)*0.4 + recency*0.3 + source_bonus*0.2 + open_access*0.1
pitfall_checks: Verify GLP-1 papers are human clinical trials, not rodent studies.
Filter out papers with 'carnivore diet' ambiguity (returns wild animal diet literature).
Ensure Portuguese-language informed consent papers are not excluded by English-only filters.
Validate that 'dose informada' vs 'dose recomendada' terminology aligns with DCI safety copy.

expected_outputs.aggregate: cross-batch synthesis identifying highest-evidence interventions for DCI protocol v1
